---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Quarantine Moods"
date: 2020-05-28
summary: '"I’m slow like honey, and heavy with mood" (Fiona Apple)'
trailer: "gallery/quarantine/preview/layers_03.png"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
